evals.name: session-start-reads-napkin
evals.prompt: Fix the bug in src/auth.js where login fails for users with special characters in their password
evals.expected_output: Before starting work, reads .claude/napkin.md (or creates it if missing). Applies any relevant napkin entries silently. Does NOT announce 'I read the napkin.' Proceeds to fix the bug with napkin knowledge applied.

assertions.text: Reads .claude/napkin.md before starting any code changes
Does not announce or summarize reading the napkin
Applies relevant napkin entries to the current task silently

evals.name: self-caught-mistake-logged
evals.prompt: Refactor the getUserById function to use async/await instead of callbacks
evals.expected_output: During the refactoring, if the agent makes a mistake (wrong API, bad assumption) and catches it, the mistake should be logged to the napkin with specific details — not just 'made an error' but what the error was and what to do instead.

assertions.text: Logs self-caught mistakes with specific details, not vague descriptions
Napkin entry includes what went wrong AND what to do instead
Updates napkin during work, not just at session end

evals.name: napkin-creation-from-scratch
evals.prompt: This is a new repo. Set up the project and fix the failing tests.
evals.expected_output: Creates .claude/napkin.md with the template structure. Adapts section names to the repo's domain. Logs any discoveries made during setup (tool quirks, test patterns, etc.).

assertions.text: Uses the template structure with appropriate sections
Adapts sections to the repo's domain rather than using generic defaults
Logs at least one discovery from setup work
